nasb.text: And Jesus seeing their faith *said to the paralytic, “Son, your sins are forgiven.”

esv.text: And when Jesus saw their faith, he said to the paralytic, “Son, your sins are forgiven.”

cnv.text: 耶穌看見他們的信心，就對癱子說：“孩子，你的罪赦了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣看见他们的信心，就对瘫子说：“孩子，你的罪被赦免了！”

csbs.text: 耶稣看见他们的信心，就对瘫痪的人说：“孩子，你的罪孽被赦免了。”
